---
title: "CV"
---

A PDF of my full curriculum vitae is generated from structured data in a
separate Quarto project.

[Download CV (PDF)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/chrischizinski/chizinski_cv/main/chizinski_cv.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}
[View source](https://github.com/chrischizinski/chizinski_cv){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}

The CV project maintains the data, bibliography, and reproducible PDF build
independently from this website.
